subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from the Wronged One unto those who have believed in God, the Protector, the Self-Subsisting, that they may be seized with the joy of My remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المظلوم الی الذین آمنوا بالله المهیمن القیوم لیاخذهم فرح ذکری
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @exhortations and counsels, @praise and encouragement, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
